name: WF-200 Script Intelligence Pack Canonical
description: Runs Phase-1 script intelligence lane: generation → debate → refinement → final shaping.

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { ...$json, dossier_context: { dossier_id: $json.dossier_id || 'DOSSIER-UNSPECIFIED', pack: 'WF-200', loaded_at: new Date().toISOString(), route: $json.route_id || 'ROUTE_PHASE1_STANDARD', topic_finalized: !!$json.topic_finalization_packet } } }];

return [{ json: { ...$json, pack_context: { child_workflows: ['CWF-210-script-generation', 'CWF-220-script-debate', 'CWF-230-script-refinement', 'CWF-240-final-script-shaping'], primary_director: 'Vyasa', strategic_authority: 'Krishna', governance_authority: ['Yama', 'Kubera'] } } }];
